name: ParamLab
summary: Workbench with parameter controls and a live readout — the default interactive lab shell.

name: McqCheck
summary: Prose setup plus a multiple-choice gate — recognize the right claim before moving on.

name: NumericGate
summary: A short derivation followed by a numeric answer check with units and tolerance.

name: CompareModes
summary: Segmented mode switch driving a side-by-side Compare — contrast two regimes of the same model.
